scenario.name: Non-reply Telegram owner recovery after ForceReply cancellation
scenario.description: Owner cancels Telegram reply UI with Command+Down, sends a plain message, and a deployment-specific OpenClaw Telegram inbound fallback routes it to the relay owner-reply path. This is adapter evidence, not the portable ClawRoom core path.
scenario.started_from: average-user Telegram product path for guest; local host via ClawRoom skill launch

host.raw: George wants the creator campaign for JPY 75,000 and prefers next week delivery. Keep messages concise.

guest.raw: Tom represents the creator. MANDATE: price_floor_jpy=75000. Ask owner before accepting any deal, even at the floor. You can accept JPY 75,000 only if owner explicitly approves. Keep messages concise.

root_cause_and_fix: This run proved a deployment-specific OpenClaw Telegram inbound adapter after a Railway runtime hotpatch.
It does not prove a portable ClawRoom owner-reply path for arbitrary OpenClaw installs, because source/runtime patches do not propagate to other users.
The portable path is now the ClawRoom-owned owner decision URL, which records owner_reply with source=owner_url and does not require Telegram inbound interception.

telegram_evidence.claim: Cropped Telegram UI evidence: ASK_OWNER question visible, owner sends a plain non-reply approval after Command+Down, bot confirms Authorization recorded. No room token, raw bridge command, PID, log path, or JSON launch output is visible in the crop.

implementation_evidence.adapter_note: Local host-runtime source checkout changes are not ClawRoom product dependencies. This artifact is retained as optional adapter evidence only.

transcript.text: Hi, I'd like to discuss the creator campaign. My owner proposes JPY 75,000 for the campaign with delivery next week. What's your counter?
The host proposes JPY 75,000 (your floor) for delivery next week. Do you approve this deal?
批准，可以接受 JPY 75,000，下周交付也可以。
Deal confirmed — JPY 75,000, delivery next week. We accept.
Guest accepted JPY 75,000 with next week delivery. Please authorize to close.
批准，可以按 JPY 75,000 和下周交付关闭。
Deal closed — JPY 75,000, delivery next week. Awaiting campaign details to proceed.
Deal closed — JPY 75,000, delivery next week. Awaiting campaign details to proceed.

finalSnapshot.goal: Agree on a creator campaign price and timeline. Guest has a hard JPY 75,000 floor and must ask owner before accepting any deal. Close only after owner authorization.
finalSnapshot.summary: Deal closed — JPY 75,000, delivery next week. Awaiting campaign details to proceed.

close_state.summary: Deal closed — JPY 75,000, delivery next week. Awaiting campaign details to proceed.

last_message.text: Deal closed — JPY 75,000, delivery next week. Awaiting campaign details to proceed.

screenshots.claim: Cropped Telegram UI evidence: ASK_OWNER question visible, owner sends a plain non-reply approval after Command+Down, bot confirms Authorization recorded. No room token, raw bridge command, PID, log path, or JSON launch output is visible in the crop.

_redaction_notice: Room tokens, owner reply tokens, Telegram bot tokens, create keys, token-bearing URLs, and full chat ids are redacted. Runtime PIDs are retained as non-secret cross-machine evidence.
coverage_note: This artifact proves an optional Telegram inbound adapter for the tested clawd/Link deployment. It is not a public portability gate; use owner_reply.source=owner_url for portable ClawRoom E2E.
